what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that associates attachment id att-a2daaa25 with board item item-157f3725 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file consists solely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The target uses a board://item-157f3725 URI scheme.
It records an ISO 8601 added timestamp with timezone offset.
standouts: It is a minimal, schema-only attachment record with no narrative or payload content.
The target URI board://item-157f3725 is the only substantive relationship signal.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a leading triple-dash block.
Attachment filenames match the declared id.
References external entities with URI-style identifiers.
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub linking att-a2daaa25 to board item item-157f3725 in dragnet-development.
questions: What content or artifact is actually attached, given only the target board item is referenced?
Is the attachment body intentionally empty or should it contain a description or payload?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a board_items attachment matches the content: it records a link to a board item and nothing else.
intention_signals: To create a durable, file-based ledger entry connecting a channel attachment to a specific board item for later retrieval or audit.
contribution: Provides a concrete attachment-to-board-item reference that a fused system can use to reconstruct channel-board relationships.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record mapping attachment att-a2daaa25 to board item item-157f3725 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a link between a channel attachment and a board item for indexing and traceability.
